message:
test(bocpd): unit tests for BOCPD resize coalescing observability (bd-37a.8)

23 integration tests covering all bd-37a.8 requirements:
- Change-point detection: known steady→burst, burst→steady, oscillatory regimes
- Coalescing behavior: N rapid resizes → final size via BOCPD-enabled coalescer
- Hazard function sensitivity: hazard_lambda, burst_prior, mu_burst_ms
- Edge cases: single resize, identical sizes, instant events, long gaps, extreme rapid
- Tracing spans: bocpd.update fields (run_length_posterior_max, change_point_probability,
  coalescing_active, resize_count_in_window) verified present and reasonable
- INFO log: regime transition events with from/to regime, p_burst, observation_count
- Metrics counter: bocpd_change_points_detected_total increments on transitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
